clips.title: Pancake Flip
clips.prompt: Western cartoon animation style, bold black outlines, flat bright colors, simplified playful shapes, exaggerated. Present day. A cheerful cartoon kitchen, checkered floor, a stove, sunny window. Morning, bright. A person in a chef's hat and apron flips an enormous pancake high into the air, grinning wide, spatula raised. A frying pan, a stack of pancakes, a butter dish. Bright flat cartoon lighting, bouncy colors. Slow dolly in. Playful cartoon aesthetic, 24fps.

Bright flat lighting, punchy primary colors. Crane rise. Bold cartoon aesthetic, 24fps.
